Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Quncheng Automation / MT-Automation.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Multi Technology (Nanjing) Automation Co., Ltd. presents a highly adaptive, multi-faceted manufacturing profile. Structured as a Sino-foreign joint venture, its corporate emails (@mt-automation.com) signify a formalized corporate network. A sharp contrast exists in its capital structure: while registering for 5 million USD, its actual paid-in capital is only 73,999 USD. However, it maintains a robust operational workforce of 25 insured employees in 2024. A deep dive into its business scope reveals a fascinating strategic pivot: alongside its foundational 'Industrial Automation Equipment' and 'Electrical Components' business, it has recently expanded into the manufacturing and sales of 'e-bikes (mopeds), mobility scooters, off-road recreational vehicles, and sports equipment'. This indicates that the facility is utilizing its core competencies in automation, transmission, and power equipment to actively manufacture light electric vehicles (LEVs) and recreational mobility products, likely targeting export markets as an OEM/assembler.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 72)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / AGILE MANUFACTURING & LEV ASSEMBLER
